title: Verify the display of the news feed
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Verify that the news feed displays recent articles with headlines and publication dates.
expected_result: The news feed should display at least two articles with headlines and publication dates.

title: Verify the functionality of the 'LIVE' button
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Click on the 'LIVE' button. | Verify that the 'LIVE' button toggles the news feed to a live stream if available.
expected_result: The 'LIVE' button should toggle the news feed to a live stream if available.

title: Verify the display of article details
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Click on the first article headline 'Deadly storms hit Egypt'. | Verify that the article details are displayed.
expected_result: The article details should include the headline, subtitle, and publication date.

title: Verify the functionality of the menu icon in the header
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Verify that the menu options are displayed.
expected_result: The menu options should be displayed.

title: Verify the navigation to other sections
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Select a different section from the menu options. | Verify that the application navigates to the selected section.
expected_result: The application should navigate to the selected section.

title: Verify data persistence
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Close the application and reopen it. | Verify that the news feed is still displayed with the same articles.
expected_result: The news feed should still be displayed with the same articles.

title: Verify accessibility/usability
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Use voice commands to interact with the application. | Verify that the application responds to voice commands.
expected_result: The application should respond to voice commands.

title: Verify interruption/resume
test_steps: Open the news application. | Navigate to the news feed section. | Pause the application. | Resume the application. | Verify that the news feed is still displayed with the same articles.
expected_result: The news feed should still be displayed with the same articles.
